arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Classic encounter against West Ham in 2011
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Town came close in the first half when Lee Bowyer hit the post and then Aaron Cresswell, who is a current Hammers player, had a 30-yard free-kick tipped onto the crossbar by keeper Rob Green with eight minutes left. Lee Bowyer scores his first goal for Ipswich Town at Upton Park.

arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Tomáš Souček bagged the equaliser with his 29th Premier League goal as West Ham ended up with a point, easing the pressure on the manager. Lopetegui could be the 12th manager to lose his first four home Premier League matches in charge at a club.
